prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (matched to the Urus S's 4.0L twin-turbo V8 EA825 engine code) with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducer, and 3D-printed Inconel turbine housings for optimized exhaust gas flow and reduced lag, paired with a custom-tuned Lamborghini-approved Motec M150 ECU reflash (Stage 2+) targeting 850+ WHP on E85 fuel with stock internals

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič Evolution Line (Urus S-specific, 4.5-inch diameter) with quad 102mm carbon-fiber tips, bypass valves, and integrated catalytic converter delete (for off-road use only), reducing backpressure by 42% and saving 18kg over OEM

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Urus S-specific, 2-way adjustable damping) with 30mm front and 25mm rear lowering springs, reinforced top mounts, and spherical bearing upper control arms by 034 Motorsport to eliminate compliance, paired with Lamborghini-approved carbon-ceramic brake kit (PCCB) with 440mm front and 380mm rear discs, six-piston calipers, and Ferodo DS2500 pads for track use
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Urus S-specific, carbon-fiber construction) with extended fenders (50mm front, 65mm rear), custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a ducktail spoiler with active Gurney flap (electronically adjustable via Urus S infotainment), all finished in Lamborghini Viola Micalizzato with satin clear coat

Forge Motorsport carbon-fiber engine cover (EA825-specific, direct OEM replacement) with exposed billet aluminum oil cap, custom heat-wrapped intake plenums (gold thermal wrap), and a secondary hood scoop (functional, feeding the GTX5533R turbos) in raw carbon fiber with a clear-coated weave

Rotiform LAS-R forged wheels (23x11.5 ET35 front, 23x12.5 ET40 rear) in gloss black with Lamborghini-approved center-lock adapters, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/25R23 front, 355/20R23 rear), paired with a custom titanium lug nut set by BBI Autosport (M14x1.5 thread, 50mm length, laser-etched Lamborghini logo)
